narrative:
Concord/Green (precinct in Fayette County) has 866 registered voters, with 49.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.4 percentage points.
